#+begin_src emacs-lisp :exports none
  ;;; chinese --- Configuring package for chinese. -*- lexical-binding: t; -*-

  ;;       And tangle the file to recreate this one.
  ;;
  ;;; Code:
#+end_src
* Introduction
这个配置文件用来配置我的chinese 相关包和配置.

* rimel
#+name: rimel
#+begin_src emacs-lisp  :comments link
  (straight-use-package 'liberime)
  (straight-use-package '(rimel :host github :repo "emacs-rime/rimel"))
  (require 'rimel)
  (setq default-input-method "rimel"
        rimel-posframe-style 'horizontal)
  (setq rimel-schema "rime_frost")

  ;; 推荐配置：代码区 + 字母后 + 大写字母
  (setq rimel-disable-predicates
      '(rimel-predicate-prog-in-code-p
        rimel-predicate-after-alphabet-char-p
        rimel-predicate-current-uppercase-letter-p))

  ;; Evil 用户推荐
  (setq rimel-disable-predicates
      '(rimel-predicate-prog-in-code-p
        rimel-predicate-after-alphabet-char-p
        rimel-predicate-current-uppercase-letter-p
        rimel-predicate-evil-mode-p))

  ;; Org 用户可以额外添加
  (add-to-list 'rimel-disable-predicates 'rimel-predicate-org-in-src-block-p)



  #+end_src

** rime 扩展函数
#+name: rime 扩展函数
#+begin_src emacs-lisp :comments link
      (defvar-local +rimel-force-enable-next-key nil
        "When non-nil, force next composable key to use Chinese input.")

      (defun +rimel--force-enable-advice (orig-fn &rest args)
        "Force `rimel--should-enable-p' once when requested."
        (if +rimel-force-enable-next-key
            (prog1 t
              (setq +rimel-force-enable-next-key nil))
          (apply orig-fn args)))

      (advice-add 'rimel--should-enable-p
                  :around #'+rimel--force-enable-advice)

      (defun +rimel-force-enable ()
        "[RIMEL] Force into Chinese input state.

    If current input method is not `rimel', activate it first.
    If currently in Evil non-editable state, switch to insert state.
    The next composable key will bypass `rimel-disable-predicates'."
        (interactive)
        (unless (equal current-input-method "rimel")
          (activate-input-method "rimel"))
        (when (and (fboundp 'rimel-predicate-evil-mode-p)
                   (rimel-predicate-evil-mode-p)
                   (fboundp 'evil-insert))
          (if (and (fboundp 'evil-append)
                   (>= (1+ (point)) (line-end-position)))
              (evil-append 1)
            (evil-insert 1)))
        (setq +rimel-force-enable-next-key t))

    ;; ------------------------------------------------------------
    ;; 3. 原来的 s-j：把光标前英文编码交给 rimel 转中文
    ;; ------------------------------------------------------------

    (defun +rimel-convert-string-at-point ()
      "Convert the string at point to Chinese using current Rime schema.

  If region is active, use region as input code.
  Otherwise, search backward from point for available code and feed it
  to `rimel'."
      (interactive)
      (+rimel-force-enable)
      (let* ((use-region (use-region-p))
             (string (if use-region
                         (buffer-substring-no-properties
                          (region-beginning) (region-end))
                       (buffer-substring-no-properties
                        (point)
                        (max (line-beginning-position) (- (point) 80)))))
             code
             length)
        (cond
         ((string-match "\\([a-z]+\\|[[:punct:]]\\)[[:blank:]]*$" string)
          (setq code (replace-regexp-in-string
                      "^[-']" ""
                      (match-string 0 string)))
          (setq length (length code))
          (setq code (replace-regexp-in-string " +" "" code))

          (if use-region
              (delete-region (region-beginning) (region-end))
            (when (> length 0)
              (delete-char (- 0 length))))

          (when (> length 0)
            ;; 确保这串 code 的第一个字符一定进入中文合成。
            (setq +rimel-force-enable-next-key t)
            (setq unread-command-events
                  (append (listify-key-sequence code)
                          unread-command-events))))
         (t
          (message "`+rimel-convert-string-at-point' did nothing.")))))


    ;; ------------------------------------------------------------
    ;; 4. 迁移 posframe 吃字 workaround
    ;;
    ;; emacs-rime 里是 advice `rime--posframe-display-content'。
    ;; rimel 里候选字符串来自 `rimel--format-candidates'，
    ;; 所以这里改为 filter-return。
    ;; ------------------------------------------------------------

    (define-advice rimel--format-candidates
        (:filter-return (content) +resolve-posframe-issue-a)
      "Append a full-width space to rimel posframe content.

  This is a workaround for occasional posframe clipping/eating characters."
      (if (and (eq rimel-show-candidate 'posframe)
               (stringp content)
               (not (string-blank-p content)))
          (concat content "　")
        content))

    ;; ------------------------------------------------------------
    ;; 5. 保留你的快捷键
    ;; ------------------------------------------------------------

    (general-define-key
        "s-j"    #'+rimel-convert-string-at-point)
#+end_src

* Technical Artifacts                                :noexport:
Let's provide a name so we can =require= this file.
#+begin_src emacs-lisp :exports none
(provide 'chinese)
;;; chinese.el ends here
#+end_src

Before you can build this on a new system, make sure that you put the cursor over any of these properties,
and hit: ~C-c C-c~

#+description: A literate programming file for configuring chinese package.

#+property:    header-args:sh :tangle no
#+property:    header-args:emacs-lisp :tangle yes
#+property:    header-args    :results none :eval no-export :comments no mkdirp yes

#+options:     num:nil toc:t todo:nil tasks:nil tags:nil date:nil
#+options:     skip:nil author:nil email:nil creator:nil timestamp:nil
#+infojs_opt:  view:nil toc:t ltoc:t mouse:underline buttons:0 path:http://orgmode.org/org-info.js
